steps.t: Thálfi is beside the river just north-west of Annâk-khurfu, preparing to scout the mountainous region in advance of the assault.
Thálfi sent you to add three locations to the parchment he gave you: two old dwarf ruins to the north-west and south-west, and a warg camp further nor…
Thálfi is at Zudramdân, the forward camp of Durin's great force. Zudramdân is north-east of the lake that borders the foothills of Elderslade.
Thálfi wanted you to add the Angmarim presence at Caivád Sâr to your map, and to defeat any of the cultists that cross your path. Caivád Sâr is to the…
Thálfi is at Zudramdân, the forward camp of Durin's great force, south of Caivád Sâr.
